mapper.insert: insert into battery_module_frame_log ( create_time, channel_name, port_name, battery_group, module_address, command_code, known, success, response_flag, payload_length, payload_hex, frame_hex, parsed_type, cell_voltage, internal_resistance, cell_temperature, leakage_status, swollen_voltage, charge_discharge_current, float_current, external_voltage, environment_temperature1, environment_temperature2, connect_battery_voltage, connect_test_voltage ) values ( datetime(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'localtime'), #{channelName}, #{portName}, #{batteryGroup}, #{moduleAddress}, #{commandCode}, #{known}, #{success}, #{responseFlag}, #{payloadLength}, #{payloadHex}, #{frameHex}, #{parsedType}, #{cellVoltage}, #{internalResistance}, #{cellTemperature}, #{leakageStatus}, #{swollenVoltage}, #{chargeDischargeCurrent}, #{floatCurrent}, #{externalVoltage}, #{environmentTemperature1}, #{environmentTemperature2}, #{connectBatteryVoltage}, #{connectTestVoltage} )
